title: What you will learn
summary: Choose a deck, ground it, review changes, and ship a checked archive.
note: The flow works for the demo or a new deck.

cards.title: Start
cards.body: Pick or create a deck with constraints and sources.

cards.title: Author
cards.body: Edit JSON, attach materials, keep context close.

cards.title: Review and ship
cards.body: Compare candidates, run checks, and archive the intended version.

narration.script: What you will learn. Choose a deck, ground it, review changes, and ship a checked archive. Start: Pick or create a deck with constraints and sources. Author: Edit JSON, attach materials, keep context close.
